prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall with warm wood textures and quest board background; Mika Ironleaf, a feminine ranger in a green half-cape with a leaf brooch, presents a sealed quest parcel to Mika Silverbrook, an androgynous coordinator in a formal cloak, using a clear two-handed delivery motion. The lighting is soft and golden, cinematic anime style, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous guild hall shot; Mika Silverbrook accepts the sealed parcel from Mika Ironleaf, both characters perform a slight, respectful bow to finalize the handoff. The camera remains steady, maintaining the professional and warm atmosphere of the RPG guild. Consistent character appearances, lighting, and background, no text, no watermark.
